selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: an increase in the quarterly annualized real-GDP growth rate indicates accelerating aggregate demand and favors QQQ's longer-duration growth exposure, while equal or lower growth favors broader SPY exposure
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: this is an aggregate real-growth acceleration allocation using BEA quarterly real-GDP growth real-time history; it is distinct from closed monthly production, retail, labor, housing, survey sentiment, inflation, money, rate, volatility, credit, commodity, currency, seasonality and price mechanisms

signal.source: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis Real Gross Domestic Product, percent change from preceding period at a seasonally adjusted annual rate, series A191RL1Q225SBEA, distributed through FRED/ALFRED real-time-period history
signal.formula: at each decision cutoff, choose the latest available revision for the newest available A191RL1Q225SBEA reference quarter and for its exact preceding calendar quarter; delta_t=current_percent_saar-previous_percent_saar
signal.target_rule: positive delta_t means QQQ weight 1.0; equal or negative delta_t means SPY weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: ALFRED realtime_start_date becomes conservatively available only at 23:59:59.999999 America/New_York; values later than the frozen cutoff are excluded
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, carry-forward beyond a qualified released quarter, nominal-GDP or GDI substitution, zero-growth level rule, annual or year-over-year transform, persistence, smoothing, price filter, volatility filter, grid or source blending
signal.ancestry_limitation: quarterly real-GDP growth is a broad, lagged and substantially revisable aggregate estimate; this limitation is frozen and no prior outcome may change the rule

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the final accepted XNYS close preceding the next monthly execution session
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.000000001490116119384765625 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(1024000000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
